Clear intelligence.
No stylist, just insight.

ai_sug_1: Your 2pm meeting is in 4 hrs — want to prep an outfit?
ai_sug_2: It's cloudy today — shall I suggest a layered look?
ai_sug_3: You haven't planned your week yet — want me to help?
ai_sug_4: Feeling indecisive? I can style you in seconds.
ai_sug_5: New drops match your saved style — want to see them?
ai_sug_6: Your Friday dinner is coming up — let's plan the look.
ai_sug_7: I noticed you love minimal styles — new picks are in.
banner_perfect_fit: {icon} {name} is a perfect fit for {temp}°C today!
bills_chat_greeting:
Hey! 💳 I'm your Bills AI Assistant.

I can help you track pending payments, summarise monthly expenses, add new bills, and keep your finances organised. What would you like to check?
bills_coupon_empty_sub: Add a coupon code above to save it here
bills_empty_desc:
Tap "Add Bill" below to scan or
manually enter your first bill.
bills_manual_sub: Fill in the details below — all * fields required
bills_sheet_add_sub: Choose how you'd like to add your bill
calendar_chat_ask_time: Got it! What time should I set the reminder for?
calendar_chat_greeting: Hi! I'm your style assistant for {occasion}. Ask me what to wear!
calendar_chat_saved_with_time: Perfect! I've saved the {occasion} plan with a reminder at {time} to your calendar.
calendar_chat_set_reminder: Awesome! I've set a reminder at {time} and saved the plan to your calendar.
calendar_chat_suggest_save: That sounds great! Would you like me to save this outfit plan and set a reminder? What time?
calendar_no_plans:
Nothing planned 🌿
Tap 'Add a Plan' below
chat_no_history:
No past chats yet.
Start a conversation!
chip_prompt_outfit: Suggest me an outfit for today
chip_prompt_workout: Give me a quick workout routine
cta_plan_today_look: Morning, {name} — want me to plan today's look?
daily_wear_ahvi_greeting:
Hi! I'm AHVI, your personal AI Assistant ✦

I can see today's weather and your outfit options. What would you like help with — styling tips, what to wear, or outfit advice for any occasion?
daily_wear_empty_desc: Your personal AI Assistant. Ask me about outfits, styling tips, what to wear today, or advice for any occasion.
diet_add_meal_entry: Please add at least one meal entry
diet_chat_fallback: I can suggest meal plans for Mediterranean, Vegan, High Protein, Keto, or Healthy diets. Try: 'Give me a weekly keto plan' 😊
diet_chat_history_empty:
Chat history coming soon.
Start a new conversation!
diet_chat_welcome:
Hi! 🥗 I'm your Diet & Nutrition AI Assistant.

I can help you plan meals, track calories, suggest recipes for your goals, and guide you towards a healthier lifestyle. What are your nutrition goals today?
diet_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
diet_visual_ai_desc: Point your camera at any food and AHVI will identify it and suggest the best meal plan for you.
fitness_add_outfit_hint: Tap + to add your first workout outfit
fitness_add_routine_hint: Add your first workout routine to get started
fitness_ahvi_fallback:
I'm here to help with workout outfit ideas! 👟
Try asking: "Suggest an outfit for yoga" or "What should I wear to the gym?"
fitness_ahvi_greet:
Hey! 👋 I'm AHVI, your AI outfit stylist.
Tell me what workout you're planning and I'll suggest the perfect look!
fitness_ahvi_styleboard_reply:
Here's your {label} style board! 🎽
Picked the best colors & vibe for your session.
fitness_ahvi_thanks: You're welcome! 💜 Let me know whenever you need a new outfit idea!
fitness_ahvi_welcome:
Hi! I'm AHVI, your AI outfit stylist ✨

Tell me what workout you're doing, and I'll suggest the perfect outfit!
fitness_ahvi_workout_detected:
Nice! A {workout} session 🔥
Want me to suggest an outfit or look for it?
fitness_chat_greeting:
Hey champ! 💪 I'm your Fitness AI Assistant.

From workout plans and exercise tips to recovery advice — I'm here to keep you moving. What's your fitness goal today?
fitness_hero_sub_1: Your outfit fuels your performance. Show up strong.
fitness_lens_desc: Point your camera at any outfit and AHVI will find the best workout match for you.
fitness_no_chats:
No chats yet.
Start a conversation!

home_card_wear_male: Structured shirt, tailored trousers, clean footwear, and a watch.

intent_style_s2: I have a date tonight — what should I wear?

item_detail_timeout_message: This took too long. Please try again.
item_detail_works_well_empty: Add more items to your wardrobe to see pairing ideas.

Hello! 💊 I'm your Medicine AI Assistant.

I can help you track medications, understand dosage schedules, flag potential interactions, and set reminders. What do you need help with today?

⚠️ Always consult your doctor for medical decisions.

Hi there! 🌿 I'm your Skincare AI Assistant.

Whether it's building a routine, picking the right ingredients, or dealing with a skin concern — I've got you. What's your skin telling you today?

Hey! ✨ I'm your personal Style AI Assistant.

Tell me the occasion, vibe, or what you're working with — I'll put together outfit ideas that actually work for you. What are we styling today?

Hello! 👗 I'm your Wardrobe AI Assistant.

I can help you organise your closet, plan outfits from what you already own, identify missing essentials, and build a wardrobe that truly works for you. Where shall we start?
